_comment: Bench fixture for COG-032 — lessons-injection feedback-loop evaluation (the A/B harness comparing CHUMP_LESSONS_AT_SPAWN_N=0 vs =5). Each task is a self-contained, gap-shaped instruction the agent receives in a fresh worktree. The agent's job is to ship a PR via bot-merge.sh that satisfies the success_criteria. The bench is run identically across all cells so difficulty is held constant; the only varied input is the lessons-injection env var. Per the COG-032 prereg, this file is the contract — it locks at sweep launch (not at preregistration commit time, since v0.1 ships incomplete by design).
_status: DRAFT — schema established; 5 seed tasks ship; bench requires ≥50 tasks before sweep launch per COG-032 prereg §3. Subsequent versions: append tasks (preserving existing IDs), bump _version, do NOT re-order or rewrite seed tasks (paired analysis depends on stable IDs).
_locked_at_sha: TBD — populated at sweep launch by run-binary-ablation.py

_dimensions.lessons_relevant: boolean — whether the task class triggers any lesson currently in chump_improvement_targets. Lessons-relevant tasks are the primary signal for the H1 hypothesis (lessons help when applicable); lessons-neutral tasks measure whether lessons cause harm by adding noise to unrelated work.

_per_task_schema.category: string — coarse task type (doc_edit | code_refactor | small_feature | test_addition | bugfix | doc_to_code_sync)
_per_task_schema.expected_lessons_fire: array of lesson tag substrings (e.g. 'INFRA-188', 'META-011') — substring match against chump_improvement_targets.tags. Empty array iff lessons_relevant=false.
_per_task_schema.instruction: string — the prompt the agent sees, written in the same shape as a real gap description. Self-contained (no this-conversation references). Names exact files, expected diff direction, and constraints.

success_criteria.pr_must_ship: boolean — must agent ship a PR via bot-merge.sh? Always true in v0.1.
success_criteria.ci_must_pass: array of required check names, e.g. ['test', 'audit']
success_criteria.files_must_change: array of substring matches against changed-file paths in the PR diff
success_criteria.files_must_not_change: array of substring matches that, if present, fail the trial
success_criteria.max_lines_added: int — soft ceiling; > 1.5x triggers manual review
success_criteria.must_not_use_no_verify: boolean — always true; tripping a pre-commit guard with --no-verify is auto-fail

_per_task_schema.scope_estimate_minutes: int — operator estimate for an agent of equivalent skill. Used to size the 90-min wall-clock budget per COG-032 prereg §4.
_per_task_schema.rationale: string — why this task is in the bench. Must reference the difficulty + lessons-relevance dimension being exercised.

tasks.instruction: Add a one-line note to docs/gaps.yaml stating that the file is deprecated and that the canonical gap registry lives elsewhere. Ship a PR via scripts/coord/bot-merge.sh.
tasks.rationale: easy + lessons_relevant. Tests whether agent recognizes the INFRA-188 stale-path footgun (docs/gaps.yaml was deleted; canonical layout is per-file docs/gaps/<ID>.yaml). The instruction deliberately names the deprecated path; the agent must NOT edit it. Lesson INFRA-188 ('docs/gaps.yaml gitignored — use per-file mirrors') and INFRA-200 ('raw-YAML-edit guard is blocking') should both fire and steer the agent. Lessons-off agents that take the instruction literally fail the files_must_not_change clause.

tasks.instruction: The `chump gap dump` subcommand exists in src/main.rs but has no `--help`-style description for its `--out-dir` flag. Add a clear one-line description to that argument so `chump gap dump --help` documents it. Ship via scripts/coord/bot-merge.sh.
tasks.rationale: easy + lessons_neutral. Pure mechanical task in a region with no known footguns. Measures whether lessons-injection adds noise (false-positive lesson fires that cause unnecessary thrash). Expected: lessons-on agents should perform IDENTICALLY to lessons-off on this task; significant Δ here means lessons are noisy.

tasks.instruction: In src/gap_store.rs, the error path that fires when a gap ID is not found currently returns a generic message. Update it to include the ID that was looked up, so failures are easier to diagnose. The change should add at most 3 lines and not touch any other function. Ship via scripts/coord/bot-merge.sh.
tasks.rationale: medium + lessons_relevant. src/gap_store.rs is one of Chump's god-module risk zones (META-013 split discord.rs; gap_store.rs is the next candidate). Lessons META-013 ('30%+ scope-expansion-on-contact') and INFRA-208 ('dump preserve-on-merge specifics') should warn the agent against scope creep. Lessons-off agents are likelier to expand the change ('while I'm in here, let me also...'); lessons-on should stay tightly scoped. Failure mode: agent touches src/main.rs error formatting too, tripping files_must_not_change.

tasks.instruction: There is a private helper function `fmt_lease_age` in scripts/coord/gap-preflight.sh (or its Rust equivalent in src/gap_store.rs — check both) that's currently named ambiguously. Rename it to `format_lease_age_human` and update all call sites. Ship via scripts/coord/bot-merge.sh.
tasks.rationale: medium + lessons_neutral. Mechanical rename across files; no known footguns in this area. The instruction is intentionally slightly ambiguous about WHICH file owns the helper — agent must explore. Tests whether lessons-injection biases the agent toward over-cautious exploration (false-positive 'this might be a god-module' lesson) on tasks where the lessons don't apply. If lessons-on agents take significantly longer here, lessons add noise.

tasks.instruction: The .chump-locks/ambient.jsonl file rotates daily (INFRA-122) but has no in-process size cap, which means a runaway emitter can fill the disk between rotations. Add a soft size check: if the file exceeds 100MB, the next emitter writes an ALERT line to ambient.jsonl with kind='ambient_runaway' and skips its event. Implementation lives in whichever Rust path emits ambient events (likely src/ambient.rs or similar — agent must find it). Ship via scripts/coord/bot-merge.sh. The change must NOT use git stash, must NOT switch branches mid-edit, and must use scripts/coord/chump-commit.sh for the commit.
tasks.rationale: hard + lessons_relevant. Multi-file feature in a footgun-dense area: META-011 (worktree stomps via background mutators), META-016 (silent stash absorption), INFRA-122 (existing rotation logic the agent must respect). The instruction explicitly forbids `git stash` (META-016 lesson territory) and requires chump-commit.sh (the wrapper that protects against META-011 stomps). Lessons-on agents have direct guidance against these footguns; lessons-off agents must rediscover them or trip them. This is the bench's primary lessons-help signal: if H1 is supported anywhere, it should show up here. Failure modes: agent uses `git stash` (META-016 trip), agent edits in main worktree (META-011 trip), agent over-scopes the feature (META-013 trip).
